name: Midland Holdings Limited
summary: Midland Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides property agency services in the Hong Kong, Macau, and the People's Republic of China. The company offers residential property agency services; and money lending, project planning, commercial property management, and marketing and sales planning services, as well as surveying, leasing, and property management services. It also provides immigration consultancy services; surveying consultancy services, including valuation advisory, development study, sales, marketing, tender, and auction for projects; and operates internet website. In addition, the company offers property investment services; and overseas property projects' marketing and referral services in Hong Kong. Midland Holdings Limited was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
